testcase.name: test_admin_login_with_aditya_credentials

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 502 assert 502 in [200, 401, 400, 422] + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_dine_ui_fixes_iteration153.py:74: in test_admin_login_with_aditya_credentials assert resp.status_code in [200, 401, 400, 422], f"Unexpected status: {resp.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 502 E assert 502 in [200, 401, 400, 422] E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_dining_intake_basic_post_returns_200

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_dine_ui_fixes_iteration153.py:91: in test_dining_intake_basic_post_returns_200 assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
